articles.title: Polygon Links With Filecoin, How Users Will Benefit From Free Storage
articles.description: Layer one network Polygon continues to expand and solidified its position in the crypto space. Recently, they announced a new partnership with Filecoin, a network that allows users to store and transfer data via a native marketplace. The cooperation launched the Filecoin-Polygon Bridge, to increase their interoperability. Built by the Textile team, the bridge enables users to use any Polygon mainnet to connect with Filecoin’s storage and (…) start storing data on Filecoin from any Polygon addres
